name: RichContent
description: Typographic content block: eyebrow + title + body + optional actions. Use for editorial sections, card bodies, and hero text blocks. Each text slot is optional — use only what the content needs.

props.name: density
props.description: tight = compact spacing, regular = more breathing room

props.name: measure
props.description: Max-width constraint on text lines. none = no constraint.

props.name: eyebrow
props.description: Small label above the title, e.g. a category or product name

props.name: textSlot
props.description: Fully custom text template — replaces eyebrow/title/body/meta rendering

notes: The title renders as <h2> by default — ensure heading hierarchy is correct for page context.

Eyebrow and body use

— do not use for headings.
Meta attribution is presentational; ensure it does not duplicate information already in title.
